meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $POWL 172/180 (rem 8d)
• $PPC 151/180 (rem 29d)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $BRK.B | NEWS+DVG+INFLECT | -2.4% | Vol 1.9x | Berkshire shares slide after earnings and CEO letter disappoints
• $CRDO | EVENT+NEWS+DVG | -9.4% | Vol 1.4x | ER in 0d
• $WLDN | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -7.4% | Vol 1.9x | Willdan falls as FY2026 outlook points to softness
• $OKTA | EVENT+NEWS+DVG | -19.7% | Vol 1.0x | ER in 2d
• $APP | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -14.9% | Vol 0.5x | AppLovin sees mixed analyst actions (upgrade flow alongside target trims)
• $CVSA | NEWS+BD200 | -18.0% | Vol 1.4x | CVSA rebrand and multi-year roadmap highlighted in investor materials
• $GM | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -4.7% | missing:rvol20 | GM recalls 2022 full-size SUVs for transmission issue that can cause rear-wheel lock-up
• $EAT | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -5.3% | Vol 0.9x | Westfield Capital sharply reduced its Brinker (EAT) position in recent filings

🎯 Triggers: APP > 441.99 (EMA21) | CVSA > 100.45 (EMA21) | BRK.B > 495.60 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Berkshire shares slide after earnings and CEO letter disappoints
focus_view_model.news_summary: Post-earnings/letter reaction turned negative, with investor focus on weaker operating momentum and muted shareholder-return messaging.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=480.31 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=492.30 (F2), EMA55=495.41 (F4), EMA21=495.60 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.90 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) confirms elevated conviction behind the post-catalyst move; treat as real repricing, not drift.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Strong Buy (F6) conflicts with a high-participation post-event sell response (V1) while price is below SMA200/EMA55/EMA21 (F2/F4/F5). In Regime=RISK_OFF (M5), confirmation bias should favor level-reclaims over rating strength.
focus_view_model.action_plan: No adds while LatestPrice=480.31 (F1) remains below SMA200=492.30 (F2). Reversal confirmation requires reclaiming EMA21=495.60 (F5) and SMA200=492.30 (F2) on improved participation; otherwise treat rallies as counter-trend in RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Berkshire shares slide after earnings and CEO letter disappoints · 0d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Credo shares fall despite Q3 results and guidance topping estimates
focus_view_model.news_summary: A sell-the-news reaction after results/guidance beat implies the tape is repricing expectations rather than rewarding reported strength.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=114.22 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=126.09 (F2), EMA55=132.11 (F4), EMA21=122.71 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.38 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) = above-normal activity around the catalyst; supports the view of an institutional repricing rather than low-volume noise.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: post-earnings selloff despite beat.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Strong Buy (F6) is failing vs tape: external catalyst is negative (external_intel) and structure remains broken below EMA21/EMA55/SMA200 (F5/F4/F2) with elevated activity (V1). This is a classic 'Buy rating' vs 'reprice' conflict under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.action_plan: Do not add until reclaim of EMA21=122.71 (F5). Higher-confidence repair requires reclaiming SMA200=126.09 (F2). If price fails repeated attempts to regain EMA21=122.71 (F5) after the catalyst, treat as persistent distribution under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Credo shares fall despite Q3 results and guidance topping estimates · 0d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Willdan falls as FY2026 outlook points to softness
focus_view_model.news_summary: The market is reacting negatively to forward outlook/guide framing, overpowering backward-looking performance narratives.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=87.48 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=94.48 (F2) and far below EMA55=113.26 (F4) / EMA21=112.46 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.91 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) is a major anomaly; confirms the sell response has broad participation (distribution risk).

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Buy (F6) diverges from the tape: price is below SMA200/EMA21/EMA55 (F2/F5/F4) with very high RVOL (V1) after a negative outlook catalyst (external_intel). Under RISK_OFF (M5), this looks more like institutional distribution than a simple dip.
focus_view_model.action_plan: No bottom-fishing. Only consider re-entry if LatestPrice (F1) reclaims SMA200=94.48 (F2) and holds, then work toward EMA21=112.46 (F5). Until SMA200=94.48 (F2) is reclaimed, treat as counter-trend risk under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Willdan falls as FY2026 outlook points to softness · 3d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Okta scheduled to report Q4/FY2026 results on March 4 (after close)
focus_view_model.news_summary: A near-term earnings event window creates high gap-risk; guidance and forward commentary likely decide whether the downtrend stabilizes or accelerates.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=73.97 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=92.16 (F2), EMA55=84.19 (F4), EMA21=79.75 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.00 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) shows no clear pre-earnings accumulation; catalyst will likely set the next impulse.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: earnings in the next 7 days.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Buy (F6) lacks tape confirmation into earnings: price is below EMA21/EMA55/SMA200 (F5/F4/F2). Under RISK_OFF (M5), avoid assuming mean reversion without post-ER level reclaim.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Earnings-risk protocol: avoid new positions pre-event. Post-ER, only act if reclaim of EMA21=79.75 (F5) occurs; stronger confirmation requires EMA55=84.19 (F4), and full trend repair requires SMA200=92.16 (F2).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Okta scheduled to report Q4/FY2026 results on March 4 (after close) · 0d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: AppLovin sees mixed analyst actions (upgrade flow alongside target trims)
focus_view_model.news_summary: Analyst actions remain mixed, adding noise and headline sensitivity while the stock stays technically damaged.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=432.98 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=508.83 (F2), EMA55=509.07 (F4), and EMA21=441.99 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.48 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) is very low; the downtrend is not being 'confirmed' by elevated participation today, but low RVOL can also mean weak bounce capacity in RISK_OFF (M5).
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: mixed analyst actions keep sentiment unstable.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Buy (F6) conflicts with a still-broken structure below EMA21/EMA55/SMA200 (F5/F4/F2). With low RVOL (V1), any rebound needs level confirmation; do not substitute rating strength for tape repair under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.action_plan: First confirmation is reclaiming EMA21=441.99 (F5). Higher-confidence repair requires SMA200=508.83 (F2). Until EMA21=441.99 (F5) is reclaimed, treat as headline-sensitive and avoid aggressive adds in RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: AppLovin sees mixed analyst actions (upgrade flow alongside target trims) · 0d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: CVSA rebrand and multi-year roadmap highlighted in investor materials
focus_view_model.news_summary: Corporate narrative reset (rebrand/roadmap) can amplify volatility while the stock is already in a downtrend with above-normal activity.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=98.00 (type=Close, asof=2026-02-27) (F1) is below SMA200=119.47 (F2), EMA55=104.77 (F4), and EMA21=100.45 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.42 (asof=2026-02-27) (V1) indicates elevated engagement around the period; watch for distribution vs base-building behavior near EMA21 (F5).
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: corporate action/roadmap messaging can drive near-term repricing.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Hold (F6) aligns with caution: price is below EMA21/EMA55/SMA200 (F5/F4/F2) while RVOL is elevated (V1). Corporate action messaging (external_intel) can trigger sharp moves, but trend remains damaged in RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.action_plan: No entry until reclaim of EMA21=100.45 (F5). If reclaimed and held, next confirmation is EMA55=104.77 (F4). Without EMA21=100.45 (F5) reclaim, assume downtrend continuation risk under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: CVSA rebrand and multi-year roadmap highlighted in investor materials · 6d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: GM recalls 2022 full-size SUVs for transmission issue that can cause rear-wheel lock-up
focus_view_model.news_summary: Recall headlines add an incremental sentiment and execution headwind while the stock remains below key long-term trend levels.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=77.74 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=81.57 (F2), EMA55=83.51 (F4), and EMA21=81.67 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=N/A (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) blocks conviction scoring; treat any bounce/break signals as lower-confidence until volume data is restored.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: recall-related negative headline flow.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Strong Buy (F6) conflicts with a still-broken structure below EMA21/EMA55/SMA200 (F5/F4/F2). With RVOL missing (V1=N/A), do not over-weight technical signals; recall headline (external_intel) adds near-term risk under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.action_plan: Wait for reclaim of EMA21=81.67 (F5) as the first stabilization signal, then SMA200=81.57 (F2) for trend repair. Do not add aggressively while price remains below EMA21=81.67 (F5) in RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: GM recalls 2022 full-size SUVs for transmission issue that can cause rear-wheel lock-up · 7d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Westfield Capital sharply reduced its Brinker (EAT) position in recent filings
focus_view_model.news_summary: A large holder reduction raises distribution risk and can pressure the tape even if fundamentals/ratings look supportive.

logic_pillars.technical: Trend_status=DOWNTREND (F3). LatestPrice=142.40 (type=Close, asof=2026-03-02) (F1) is below SMA200=150.45 (F2), EMA55=152.31 (F4), and EMA21=153.04 (F5). Local NEWS PACK unavailable (N1).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.87 (asof=2026-03-02) (V1) is not panic-level; suggests steady selling/overhang rather than capitulation—consistent with a distribution narrative.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: institutional position reduction = overhang risk.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Overall=Strong Buy (F6) conflicts with (a) price below SMA200/EMA55/EMA21 (F2/F4/F5) and (b) institutional overhang risk from filings (external_intel). In RISK_OFF (M5), tape/flow tends to dominate rating strength.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Avoid new entries until reclaim of SMA200=150.45 (F2) and EMA21=153.04 (F5). If price fails to regain SMA200=150.45 (F2), treat as distribution risk under RISK_OFF (M5).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Westfield Capital sharply reduced its Brinker (EAT) position in recent filings · 3d · 1 src
